name: Igor
notes: Provides clues needed to defeat Dracula.
standardDialog: Keep your lantern high. Shadows here remember faces.
If you seek Dracula's weakness, begin where old vows were broken.

name: Castle Librarian
notes: Holds information about the Sacred Tome.
standardDialog: Books bite when handled by fools. Turn pages carefully.
Knowledge is a blade. Know where to point it.

name: Captain Marla
notes: Leads moonlit supply routes and knows hidden road hazards.
standardDialog: Moonlight keeps the raiders nervous. We move when they squint.
Tie your packs high. Mud steals more than bandits do.

name: Warden Bren
notes: Coordinates militia patrols and tracks nearby den activity.
standardDialog: Bandits test fences first, then resolve.
If you clear the den, people will sleep with both eyes shut.

name: Ferryman Colt
notes: Controls crossing schedules when floodwaters rise.
standardDialog: River decides the fare. I just collect it.
Storm upstream means trouble here by sundown.
